steps.title: Substitute both expressions
steps.content:
Use the given expressions for $a$ and $b$ in $a-b$.
$$(6k+4r)-(10k-9r+5)$$

steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtracting the second expression changes the sign of every term inside the parentheses.
$$6k+4r-10k+9r-5$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Group the $k$-terms and $r$-terms, then simplify. $$(6k-10k)+(4r+9r)-5=-4k+13r-5$$ The answer is B.
